title: Official Documents- Supplemental Contribution Amendment to the Restated and Amended Administration Agreement with the Government of the Federal Republic of Germany, acting through its MECD, for TF022835 (No. 57).pdf
text:
The World Bank                                              1818 H Street N.W.           (202) 473-1000
INTERNATIONAL BANK FOR RECONSTRUCTION AND DEVELOPMENT       Washington, D.C. 20433       Cable Address: INTBAFRAD
INTERNATIONAL DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATION                       U.S.A.                       Cable Address: INDEVAS




                                                                                      17-Mar-2026




            Mrs. Laura Schmidt
            Head of Division
            Ministry of Economic Cooperation and Development
            Division Z 12 - Human Resources Development, Human Resources Abroad
            Dahlmannstrasse 4
            Bonn 53113
            Federal Republic of Germany


               Supplemental Contribution Amendment to the Restated and Amended
               Administration Agreement between the Government of the Federal Republic of
               Germany, acting through its Ministry of Economic Cooperation and
               Development, and the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development
               and the International Development Association concerning the Donor Funded
               Staffing Program (Trust Fund No. 022835)


           Dear Mrs. Schmidt:

           1.      We refer to the Restated and Amended Administration Agreement between the
           Government of the Federal Republic of Germany, acting through its Ministry of Economic
           Cooperation and Development (the “Donor”), and the International Bank for Reconstruction and
           Development (“IBRD”) and the International Development Association (“IDA”) (collectively, the
           “Bank”), regarding the Donor Funded Staffing Program (Trust Fund No. 022835) (the “Trust
           Fund”) effective as of July 1, 2011, as amended (the “Agreement”).

           2.     We are pleased to acknowledge, on behalf of the Bank, the intention of the Donor
           to make a supplemental contribution to the Trust Fund in the amount of two hundred thirty
           thousand seven hundred fifty-eight United States Dollars (US$ 230,758) (the
           “Supplemental Contribution”). The Supplemental Contribution will be allocated to the
           Junior Level Window.

           3.     The Donor shall deposit the Supplemental Contribution into such bank account
           designated by the Bank promptly following countersignature of this Amendment by the
           Donor and submission of a payment request by the Bank.

           4.      When making such deposit, the Donor shall instruct its bank to include in its
           payment details information (remittance advice) field of its SWIFT payment message,
           information indicating: the amount paid, that the payment is made by the Donor for
           TF022835 (the “Donor Funded Staffing Program”) and the date of the deposit (the “Deposit
           Instruction”). In addition, the Donor shall provide a copy of the Donor’s Deposit
                                                -2-

Instruction to the Bank's Accounting Trust Funds Division by e-mail sent to
tfremitadvice@worldbank.org or by fax sent to (202) 614-1315.

5.      All other terms and conditions of the Agreement shall remain the same.

6.      The Bank will disclose this Amendment and related information on this Trust Fund
in accordance with the World Bank Policy on Access to Information. By entering into this
Amendment, the Donor consents to disclosure of this Amendment and related information
on this Trust Fund.

7.     Please confirm your agreement with the foregoing, on behalf of the Donor, by
signing and dating the Amendment. Upon receipt by the Bank of the original countersigned
by you, this Amendment shall become effective as of the date of the countersignature.

                                       Sincerely,

     INTERNATIONAL BANK FOR RECONSTRUCTION AND DEVELOPMENT
             INTERNATIONAL DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATION




                                     Sam it Nag
                                      Director
                                   Human Resources




CONFIRMED AND AGREED:

GOVERNMENT OF THE FEDERAL REPUBLIC OF GERMANY, ACTING
THROUGH ITS MINISTRY OF ECONOMIC COOPERATION AND
DEVELOPMENT

By: /y-z^ xJ^^v^aV^                                  Date:

     Laura Schmidt
     Head of Division
